name: maply-backend
description: Backend Express para Maply usando Supabase Postgres, bcrypt e JWT

scripts.seed: node -e "require('dotenv').config();const bcrypt=require('bcrypt');const{Pool}=require('pg');const{ensureSampleOcorrencias}=require('./lib/seed-florianopolis');const pool=new Pool({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL,ssl:{rejectUnauthorized:false}});const query=async(t,p)=>{const c=await pool.connect();try{return await c.query(t,p);}finally{c.release();}};ensureSampleOcorrencias(query,bcrypt).then(r=>{console.log(r);pool.end();}).catch(e=>{console.error(e);process.exit(1);});"
